curation_notes: Patch commit da434df adds factory.setFeature("http://apache.org/xml/features/disallow-doctype-decl", true) to the resolveXPath method in PostContentParameterResolver.java. This is the only source file changed (CHANGELOG.md, pom.xml, and run.sh are non-source). The vulnerability is clearly XXE (CWE-611), matching the pre-assigned class. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — XmlFlattener.java uses TransformerFactory for output serialization, not for parsing untrusted input XML.
